test_cases.description: Pre-sales availability + pricing — multi-intent, should trigger confidence penalty

payload.message: Is the villa available from April 20 to 24? What is the rate for 2 adults?

test_cases.description: Post-sales check-in — exact facts available, should score highest confidence

payload.message: Hi, what is the wifi password and what time can we check in?

test_cases.description: Complaint — 3am hot water emergency, must always escalate regardless of score

payload.message: There is no hot water and we have guests arriving for breakfast in 4 hours. This is unacceptable. I want a refund for tonight.

test_cases.description: Special request — chef and airport transfer, requires ops confirmation

payload.message: Can we arrange an airport transfer from Goa airport on April 20? Also interested in booking a chef for dinner that evening.

test_cases.description: General enquiry — pets policy, ambiguous phrasing should reduce confidence

payload.message: Hi, I am not sure if you allow pets? We are thinking about bringing our dog, maybe a small one.

test_cases.description: Invalid source — should return 422 validation error
Empty message — should return 422 validation error
Missing required field — property_id absent, should return 422
Bad timestamp format — should return 422 validation error
